title: potentilla fragarioides subsp. freyniana
intro: Potentilla fragarioides subsp. freyniana, also known as the strawberry cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antimicrobial properties. Potentilla fragarioides subsp. freyniana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
